business.headline: 8th Pay Commission: 4 big demands including Rs 72,000 minimum pay and OPS returnAs talks around the 8th Pay Commission move forward, government employees are pushing for big changes, including a Rs 72,000 minimum pay and OPS return. But will these demands make the final cut? Let's have a look.

Sensex, Nifty close higher despite oil above $100, IT and pharma lead recoveryThe BSE Sensex closed at 77,303.63, up 639.42 points or 0.83%, while the NSE Nifty 50 settled at 24,092.70, gaining 194.75 points or 0.81%.

Infosys exits top 10 as weak outlook deepens doubts over India IT growthWith its market capitalisation now at around Rs 4.9 lakh crore, Infosys has dropped out of the top 10 list, while LIC has moved in with a valuation of about Rs 5.1 lakh crore.

MobiKwik shares jump 15% today: Why the stock is rallying sharplyMobiKwik shares surged after the RBI approved the group's NBFC licence application. The clearance sharpens its lending push and has raised expectations around the company's next phase of growth.

Bitcoin at 12-week high near $78,000 mark: 3 key factors explainedThe world's largest cryptocurrency is once again on the move, touching a 12-week high near $78,000. The steady nature of this rise is making investors curious, i.e., what exactly is fuelling this momentum?

Crude oil near $110: 7 warning signs India should not ignoreBrent crude has climbed above $107 as markets watch whether tensions and supply risks push oil towards $110. For India, the focus is on how sustained high crude could affect inflation, the rupee, imports and business costs.

Sukanya Samriddhi update: Any change in interest rates this quarter?Parents investing in Sukanya Samriddhi often keep an eye on rate changes. So, has anything changed this quarter, or is it more of the same? Here's what you need to know.

India–New Zealand FTA: what's cheaper, what's protected, who benefitsIndia and New Zealand will sign a fast-tracked free trade agreement in New Delhi on April 27. The pact opens duty-free access, work visas, services and investment while shielding sensitive Indian sectors.

Delaying your ITR? Know these key deadlines for filing and correctionsMany taxpayers push their ITR filing to a later date, thinking there's plenty of time. But missing key deadlines can cost more than expected. Here's what you need to know before you delay.

NTPC eyes two nuclear units in Bihar's Banka, may invest Rs 25,000 croreThe company is currently conducting a feasibility study to build two nuclear power units of 700 MW each in Banka district, located around 250 km from Patna. If approved, the project could involve an investment of around Rs 25,000 crore.

Is NPS Swasthya enough for medical emergencies? Here's the realityWith rising healthcare costs, many are turning to NPS Swasthya as a safety net. But is it enough when a real emergency strikes? The answer may not be as reassuring as it sounds.

Explained: Why stock markets are rising even as crude oil remains above $100The BSE Sensex was trading at 77,334.39, up 670.18 points or 0.87%, while the NSE Nifty 50 gained 199.80 points or 0.84% to 24,097.75.

Sun Pharma's biggest-ever bet: Mega Organon deal, debt risk and global pushSun Pharma just made the biggest bet in Indian pharma history. Markets loved it instantly. Here's why investors backed the Organon deal despite the massive price tag.

Cohance Lifesciences hits 20% upper circuit: Why the stock rising today?Cohance Lifesciences jumped 20% after appointing former Cipla CEO Umang Vohra. Investors are betting his leadership can accelerate growth and transform the company's global ambitions.

Decoding Sun Pharma's $11.75 billion deal: Why the pharma stock jumped 7% today?The stock was trading around Rs 1,739.70 as of 9:46 am, up over 7%, after touching a high of Rs 1,741.85 during the session, reflecting strong investor interest following the announcement.

Paytm shares tumble 6% today: Is this dip a buying chance for investors?Paytm shares fell 6% today. Is this panic-driven weakness, or a smart chance for investors to buy into the fintech stock at lower levels now?

Sun Pharma shares jump over 7% after $11.75 billion Organon dealSun Pharma has agreed to buy Organon in an all-cash $11.75 billion deal, including debt. The takeover expands its reach in women's health and marks a sharper global push.
Sensex, Nifty jump nearly 1% in early trade: Sun Pharma up 5%The S&P BSE Sensex was up by 523.17 points to 77,187.38, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 158.35 points to 24,056.30 as of 9:22 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market rise or fall today?GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 24,143.50 as of 8:15 am, indicating a gap-up opening of nearly 1% compared to Friday's close of 23,897.95.

8th Pay Commission to start talks from April 28, many unions may miss outThe 8th Pay Commission has begun consultations with unions and staff associations in Delhi. The early discussions have also sparked confusion over unofficial salary figures as employees await formal recommendations.

entertainment.headline: Is Sai Pallavi the right Sita? Here's what internet thinks after viral video Sai Pallavi's Hindi remarks at the Ek Din event have triggered fresh debate over her casting as Sita in Ramayana. The reaction has split social media, with many questioning the choice and supporters citing performance over language fluency.

Akashdeep Saigal returns to Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2 with shocking twist Akashdeep Saigal returned to Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2, but not as his original character Ansh Gujral. The actor now plays Ansh's second son Reyansh aka Rio, and his entry leaves Tulsi shocked.

Rekha's Umrao Jaan set for European premiere at UK Asian Film Festival A restored 4K print of Rekha's Umrao Jaan will have its European premiere at the Tongues on Fire UK Asian Film Festival in London. The screening is aimed at celebrating South Asian stories.

Apex review: Charlize Theron, Taron Egerton anchor an underwritten survival thrillerRelease Date:Fri Apr 24, 2026 Charlize Theron plays a thrill-seeker hunted through an Australian national park in Apex. The film sets up a tense survival duel but rarely finds the writing or menace to deepen it.

Spider-Noir trailer: Nicolas Cage is 1930s private investigator in new Marvel series The official trailer for Spider-Noir, features Nicolas Cage in the lead role. The series will launch globally on May 27, with viewers able to watch it in black and white or full colour.

Exam: Dushara Vijayan, Aditi Balan's series to release in May. Check date Prime Video has announced that its Tamil Original series Exam will premiere on May 15. The seven-episode drama places ambition, injustice, and moral conflict within a high-pressure competitive exam setting.

Michael box office: MJ film earns $217 million globally in 3 days. See India numbers Michael earned $217 million globally in its opening weekend. The biopic of King of Pop, Michael Jackson, broke genre records in India. But was that good enough to set the Indian box office afire? Read on to find out.

Ginny Wedss Sunny 2's Medha Shankr, Avinash Tiwary on unsolicited career advice Medha Shankr and Avinash Tiwary opened up about handling unsolicited career advice in the film industry. The Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 actors shared their perspectives on choosing the right work over outside pressure.

Kantara mimicry row: Court accepts Ranveer Singh's apology, orders temple visit The Karnataka High Court accepted Ranveer Singh's unconditional apology in the Kantara mimicry case after his revised affidavit was filed. The court indicated the matter would be disposed of and asked him to visit the Chamundeshwari temple within four weeks.

Golmaal 5: Ajay Devgn, team finish Ooty shoot, share fun BTS video The Golmaal 5 cast has completed its Ooty schedule, with Rohit Shetty and Ajay Devgn sharing glimpses from the shoot. The film will reportedly feature Akshay Kumar as the antagonist.

Shraddha Kapoor gives shoutout to boyfriend Rahul Mody's ad with Aneet Padda Shraddha Kapoor praised an advertisement directed by Rahul Mody, featuring Aneet Padda, on social media. She complimented both Aneet's performance and Rahul's direction, calling him "very talented" in her post.

Governor: First-look posters of Manoj Bajpayee and Adah Sharma released The makers of Governor: The Silent Saviour have released new character posters featuring Manoj Bajpayee and Adah Sharma. The film is set to hit cinemas on June 12, 2026.

Rukmini Vasanth or Sai Pallavi: Which actor would play MS Subbulakshmi in biopic? Fresh reports say Rukmini Vasanth may replace Sai Pallavi in the MS Subbulakshmi biopic. With no official confirmation yet, the latest casting buzz has renewed focus on who will lead the film.

Madgaon Express sequel: Actor Divyenndu shares big update Actor Divyenndu has confirmed that the sequel to Madgaon Express is currently in the works. He revealed that Kunal Kemmu is writing the script.

Bhooth Bangla box office Day 10: Strong Sunday boosts global total to Rs 180 crore Akshay Kumar's Bhooth Bangla added Rs 12.50 crore on Day 10, pushing its worldwide gross to Rs 179.48 crore. A strong second weekend has helped it surpass several of the actor's recent releases, despite mixed reviews.

BTS member Jung Kook apologises over technical glitch during Arirang Tampa tour BTS's Jung Kook apologised to ARMY after a brief sound glitch disrupted their Tampa performance of Magic Shop. Fans said the issue was quickly fixed and defended the group against criticism online.

Ektaa Kapoor confirms Naagin 7 finale date, says show will return next year Ektaa Kapoor has confirmed that Naagin 7 will air its final episode on her birthday. She assured fans that the show will return next year with a shorter, tighter format.

Sai Pallavi gets emotional at Ek Din event, apologises for poor Hindi At the Ek Din promotional event, Sai Pallavi delivered an emotional speech and thanked Aamir Khan and the team. Her remarks captured both her gratitude for the film and her nervousness before her first Hindi release.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 39: Just Rs 33 shy of Baahubali 2 record Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has reached Rs 1,777 crore worldwide after 39 days in theatres. The film now needs Rs 33 crore more to overtake Baahubali 2 in the list of India's highest-grossing releases.

general news.headline: US humiliated by Iran: German Chancellor's reality-check on warFriedrich Merz questioned the United States' exit strategy in the Iran war and warned about risks in the Strait of Hormuz. His remarks highlighted European concern over Tehran's strength, energy disruption and economic fallout.

Mumbai family feasts on biryani, watermelon, all 4 found dead next morningA late-night meal, sudden illness and a race to save four lives. What unfolded inside a Mumbai home has left more questions than answers, with investigators awaiting crucial postmortem findings.

Can't stop oil output, can't export: Iran's dead tanker storing crude on seaIran is running out of room to store its oil produced at Kharg Island. Exports are blocked due to the US's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, forcing it to turn to ageing tankers as a stopgap. With the island nearing its storage capacity, the country is racing against time before its oil storage hits a breaking point.

80 no age to fight: SC urges mediation in Sunjay Kapur's mother vs widow will battleRani Kapur, late industrialist Sunjay Kapur's mother, has alleged she was fraudulently divested of her estate through a family trust, while the court emphasised resolving the dispute amicably even as it agreed to hear the matter on merits.

Mamata faces intense BJP fight on her Bhabanipur turf. What does that reveal?The BJP has transformed Mamata Banerjee's safest constituency into West Bengal's most-watched contest in the 2026 West Bengal Assembly election. With Suvendu Adhikari as the challenger, caste surveys and door-to-door campaign, the Trinamool Congress chief faces the most serious test on her turf yet.

You're a disgrace: Trump berates journalist for quoting gala dinner shooter's noteDonald Trump clashed with CBS News journalist Norah O'Donnell after she read from White House event shooter Cole Allen's manifesto on air, which referred to a "pedophile, rapist, and traitor".

Surat man kills dietitian wife, hides body in cement-filled crateA handwritten note found at the couple's home, allegedly written by Vishal and handed to police by their minor son, proved crucial, with a confession-like line that he had made a grave mistake and that Shilpa was no longer alive.

Has India expanded strategic petroleum reserves? The facts amid global oil crisisIndia can handle brief oil shocks with its strategic petroleum reserves in caverns. But India's oil reserves have remained unchanged for over a decade while other countries, like China, have expanded them aggressively. Here's a look at India's oil buffer amid the global energy crisis.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 39: Just Rs 33 shy of Baahubali 2 recordRanveer Singh's Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has reached Rs 1,777 crore worldwide after 39 days in theatres. The film now needs Rs 33 crore more to overtake Baahubali 2 in the list of India's highest-grossing releases.

Faith shattered: Kejriwal boycotts judge who refused to recuse in Delhi excise caseIn a letter, the AAP chief said he has lost faith in the judge's ability to deliver justice, and that he will follow Gandhi's protest path, and retains the right to approach the Supreme Court against the verdict.

Not including Mr Patel: White House event shooter left FBI chief off hitlistIn the manifesto, Cole Thomas Allen called himself the 'Friendly Federal Assassin' and said he intended to target Trump administration officials, ranking them from the highest level downwards.

UP school principal clashes with parents over notebooks, fees. Video goes viralA video from Hardoi's Sunbeam School shows principal Mamta Mishra confronting parent Neelam Verma over additional notebooks. The clash has led to a complaint and an official enquiry into pressure on families to buy school supplies.

Fossil unearthed by rains in Tamil Nadu turns out to be ancient relicScientists involved in the study say the fossils could provide valuable insights into the type of species that once inhabited the region, as well as the environmental conditions that prevailed during the late Holocene.

Live: Hezbollah says direct talks with Israel out of question, vows continued resistanceUS-Iran War Live: Iran's Foreign Minister Syed Abbas Araghchi has reached St Petersburg for high-level discussions with Russian President Vladimir Putin, describing the visit as an opportunity to review ongoing war-related developments and regional tensions. He indicated that earlier engagements in Islamabad were constructive, with both sides examining conditions required for resuming dialogue between Iran and the US. Amid these diplomatic efforts, global energy markets have reacted, with Brent crude prices climbing over two percent as uncertainty persists around negotiations. On the ground, tensions remain elevated, with the US military maintaining pressure through a maritime blockade targeting Iranian ports, forcing dozens of vessels to change course. The wider region continues to see instability spill over, as Israeli forces carried out strikes near the entrance of Kafra, severing access routes and adding to concerns of further escalation. Catch all the live updates at indiatoday.in.

India–New Zealand FTA: what's cheaper, what's protected, who benefitsIndia and New Zealand will sign a fast-tracked free trade agreement in New Delhi on April 27. The pact opens duty-free access, work visas, services and investment while shielding sensitive Indian sectors.

Who is Michael Glantz, the man who kept eating during White House press dinner chaosAt the White House Correspondents' Dinner, attendees ducked after reports of gunshots while Michael Glantz stayed seated and ate his salad. His reasons have amused the internet.

Killer heatwave in April: Does India need to rethink summer vacation timing for schools?With a shift in weather patterns, several states in India witness a spike in temperatures much earlier than previously recorded. This forces schools to shut down ahead of schedule. With April seeing heatwaves and turning as harsh as mid-May, there's a strong case for rethinking India's school calendar.

Gen Z damage control? Raghav Chadha calls AAP toxic workplace, explains switchIn his first remarks since joining the BJP, Raghav Chadha said he quit the Aam Aadmi Party after growing disillusioned with it. He said the move followed disappointment with the party's "toxic" working style and added that he would remain active in public life.

Capture a monkey, earn Rs 600: Maharashtra scheme to curb human-wildlife conflictMaharashtra has launched a scheme that pays Rs 600 for safely capturing and relocating monkeys. It is meant to ease growing conflict in settlements while keeping earlier wildlife safeguards intact.

Angkrish Raghuvanshi fined after angry reaction to controversial LSG dismissalIPL 2026: Angkrish Raghuvanshi was fined 20 per cent of his match fee after his angry reaction to a controversial dismissal against Lucknow Super Giants. The obstructing-the-field call sparked debate and drew protests from the KKR camp.

Need money to study, need education to earn: The vicious loop trapping studentsMany students need to borrow money before they can access quality education, yet need education first to earn money. This creates a cycle of education loans, pressure, forced careers and mental stress. From expensive degrees to unwanted jobs, many young people feel trapped before adult life has even properly begun today.

Had child together, now she calls it rape: SC flags live-in relationship risksThe Supreme Court said the collapse of a long-term live-in relationship cannot by itself amount to rape. It said such relationships carry limited legal protections, though maintenance for the child can still be sought.

Pakistan not a suitable intermediary, says Iranian MP amid stalled talksIranian lawmaker Ebrahim Rezaei said Pakistan is not a suitable intermediary in the ongoing talks. His remarks come as Abbas Araghchi steps up diplomacy from Oman to Islamabad to keep negotiations moving.

Isha Ambani brings blue Dior gown to life (one of her best looks, hands down)Isha Ambani wore a Dior Spring 2026 couture gown while welcoming Rihanna at the Fenty Beauty launch in Mumbai. We believe, this is one of her best looks so far.

sports.headline: South Africa vs India, 5th Women's T20I: Live Score and Updates from Benoni SAW vs INDW, 5th T20I Live Score: South Africa have won the toss and opted to bowl first at the Willowmoore Park in Benoni. Arundhati Reddy, Smriti Mandhana and Shreyanka Patil are back for the visiting team. The Proteas have brought in Anneke Bosch and Nadine de Klerk for Tumi Sekhukhune and Kayla Reyneke.

Can I open? Chahal's cheeky PBKS question gets hilarious reply from Preity Zinta Yuzvendra Chahal asked Preity Zinta on X if he could open the batting for Punjab Kings in one IPL 2026 match. However, Zinta stole the show with a witty response back to the PBKS spinner .

Thomas Cup: India storm into quarterfinal after hammering Australia 5-0 Thomas Cup 2026: 2022 champions India beat Australia 5-0 in Horsens to book their Thomas Cup quarter-final place. The result kept them atop Group A and set up a table-deciding clash against China.

I take Rs. 100 per photo: Sooryavanshi pranks young RR fans in viral video Rajasthan Royals opener Vaibhav Sooryavanshi pranked two young fans at an airport by claiming he charged Rs 100 for a photograph. The light moment came as the 15-year-old continued his rapid rise in IPL 2026 after another explosive hundred.

DC vs RCB is where our season begins: Parth Jindal issues message to fans IPL 2026: Parth Jindal has urged Delhi Capitals to stay united before their crucial IPL 2026 match against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. The fixture carries added weight as Delhi look to revive their playoff push after a damaging loss to Punjab Kings.

Relieve Pant of captaincy, make Markram LSG skipper: Ex-India opener Wasim Jaffer has urged Lucknow Super Giants to replace Rishabh Pant with Aiden Markram as captain after the loss to Kolkata Knight Riders. He argued that freeing Pant from leadership duties and resetting the batting order could help arrest LSG's slide.

PV Sindhu remembers old friend as Sawe smashes marathon world record PV Sindhu hailed Sebastian Sawe after he became the first athlete to run an official sub-two-hour marathon in London. Her reaction also remembered Kelvin Kiptum, linking Sawe's record to a dream long seen as unreachable.

25 doping tests in 2 months: How the fastest-ever marathoner conquered time and doubt Through injury setbacks and rigorous, self-funded anti-doping checks, Kenya's Sabastian Sawe delivered a historic 1:59:30 at the London Marathon, becoming the first athlete to break the two-hour barrier in a sanctioned race.

Rohit amps up training, set for return in MI vs SRH clash after injury layoff Rohit Sharma has intensified training and is likely to be available for the Mumbai Indians against the Sunrisers Hyderabad. His return would allow Mumbai Indians to reset an unsettled opening combination after his hamstring lay-off.

Angkrish Raghuvanshi fined after angry reaction to controversial LSG dismissal IPL 2026: Angkrish Raghuvanshi was fined 20 per cent of his match fee after his angry reaction to a controversial dismissal against Lucknow Super Giants. The obstructing-the-field call sparked debate and drew protests from the KKR camp.

Rohan Jaitley's safety push at DDCA shines after Ngidi injury at Delhi stadiumIPL 2026: Lungi Ngidi suffered an on-field injury during the IPL 2026 match between Delhi Capitals and Punjab Kings at the Arun Jaitley Stadium. The swift medical response and his stable discharge underlined the venue's focus on player safety.

Dig at CSK? Shubman Gill poses with whistle in Chennai, sparks mixed fan reactionsIPL 2026, CSk vs GT: Shubman Gill's Instagram post with a CSK yellow whistle triggered a sharp reaction after Gujarat Titans beat Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Gill's visiting side hammered the Super Kings to move into the top-four of the points table.

Bengaluru stadium security scare: 2 staffers cut 240 CCTV feeds on IPL match dayA major security lapse was reported during the RCB vs GT match earlier this season at the Chinnaswamy stadium in Bengaluru. Despite the breach, swift action ensured the game continued without incident.

Rajat Patidar raising captaincy standards at RCB: Dinesh KarthikIPL 2026: Rajat Patidar's calm leadership is shaping RCB's strong IPL 2026 run. Backed by explosive batting, he is setting the tempo on and off the field.

RCB's Tim David, Romario Shepherd play cricket in gullies of Delhi: VideoDC vs RCB: Tim David and Romario Shepherd were seen playing gully cricket in Delhi before the Royal Challengers Bengaluru's match against Delhi Capitals. The light-hearted outing came ahead of a rematch that could shape RCB's title defence.

Virat Kohli's homecoming in focus as RCB look to pounce on wounded DCIPL 2026, DC vs RCB preview: Virat Kohli returns to Delhi once again with RCB as they take on a wounded and inconsistent DC side, looking to bounce back from the thrashing loss against Punjab. With the playoff race heating up, can Delhi halt RCB's momentum?

Pooran's 0, Langer's delusion: How LSG ignored stats to hand KKR a Super Over giftIPL 2026, LSG vs KKR: Lucknow Super Giants sent Nicholas Pooran to face Sunil Narine in the Super Over but managed just one run against Kolkata Knight Riders. The decision, defended by head coach Justin Langer, has drawn criticism given Pooran's underwhelming record in previous Super Overs.

IPL Play of the Day: Rinku Singh's got to catch 'em all at LucknowLSG vs KKR: Rinku Singh starred in every phase for KKR in Lucknow, scoring 83 not out and taking five catches, including the decisive grab in the Super Over that sealed Kolkata's dramatic win over LSG.

Definitely need a break: Rishabh Pant's reaction after Super Over loss vs KKRLSG vs KKR: Rishabh Pant said Lucknow Super Giants need a break, a reset and greater accountability after their crushing Super Over defeat to Kolkata Knight Riders left them bottom of the IPL table.

Rinku Singh rescues KKR again as LSG hit rock bottom after Super Over thrillerIPL 2026, LSG vs KKR: Rinku Singh scored 83 runs, took five catches and hit the winning runs in the Super Over as Kolkata Knight Riders beat the Lucknow Super Giants at the Ekana Stadium in Lucknow.

Kartik Tyagi allowed to bowl despite 2 waist-high full tosses: ExplainedKartik Tyagi bowled 2 waist-high full tosses in the final over of Lucknow vs Kolkata. However, he was allowed to continue with his over. Here's why?

Shubman Gill unhappy with Gujarat Titans despite big win vs CSKGujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill was not happy with his team despite a big win against Chennai Super Kings. Gill said that the team needed to close out innings better with the ball.

Self-belief, small tweaks: How Deepti Sharma bounced back to silence criticsSAW vs INDW, 4th T20I: Deepti Sharma bounced back to form and silenced her critics, finishing with figures of 4-0-19-5 to help India beat South Africa by 14 runs on Saturday in Johannesburg.

MS Dhoni injured again? CSK head coach explains why he did not play vs GTIPL 2026: Stephen Fleming highlighted that MS Dhoni's calf injury resurfaced during their warm-up game. CSK are looking to play it safe so that the injury does not rule him out of the season.

Unpredictable Chepauk pitch digs CSK's grave in ChennaiChennai Super Kings faltered at home against Gujarat Titans in a day-game on Sunday, April 26. An unpredictable pitch turned out to be the downfall for CSK, who simply did not score enough runs against Shubman Gill's Gujarat.

Frustrated CSK fans leave Chepauk early after poor show during clash against GTIPL 2026, CSK vs GT: Chennai Super Kings slumped to an eight-wicket defeat against Gujarat Titans at Chepauk, with frustrated fans leaving early as Sai Sudharsan's blistering knock sealed the chase.

Angkrish Raghuvanshi run-out controversy: Was it out or not out?LSG vs KKR: Kolkata Knight Riders were left fuming after the TV umpire gave Angkrish Raghuvanshi run-out for obstructing the field. KKR coaches Shane Watson and Abhishek Nayar were seen arguing with the umpire after their batter was given out for obstructing the field.

Mayank Yadav return to IPL lasts one game. Pacer dropped after conceding 60 runsLSG vs KKR, IPL 2026: Mayank Yadav was benched by the Lucknow Super Giants despite the pacer making his return to the side after a long injury spell.

LSG vs KKR Highlights: Rinku shines in Lucknow as Kolkata win Super OverLucknow (LSG) vs Kolkata (KKR) Highlights, IPL 2026: Rinku Singh completes the job for Kolkata Knight Riders as he hits the boundary to wrap up this game. KKR win the Super Over.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
